en_title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Official Synopsis Teases Mysterious New Villain That 'No One Can See'
cn_title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》官方剧情简介暗示神秘新反派「无人能见」
subtitle: 隐形的敌人
opus_summary: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》公布新剧情简介，提到一名「无人能见的强大反派」将成为新威胁。已确认反派包括蝎子、狼蛛等，传闻Sadie Sink饰演琴·葛蕾。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day's official plot synopsis is now availale, and it teases the villain fans will see in the upcoming Marvel movie.
paragraphs.cn: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》的官方剧情简介现已公布，其中暗示了漫威新片中将会登场的反派角色。

paragraphs.en: Ahead of tomorrow's ticket pre-sales for Spider-Man: Brand New Day, a new synopsis of the movie has been released on the film's official website . It's similar to previous plot summaries, but there is one key difference: the new synopsis mentions a "powerful villain no one can even see."
paragraphs.cn: 在《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》明日预售票开启前，该片官网发布了一份新剧情简介。它与之前的剧情概要有相似之处，但有一个关键区别：新简介提到了一位「无人能见的强大反派」。

paragraphs.en: "It's a Brand New Day for Peter Parker," the synopsis says. "Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him — and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him —sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves — a powerful villain no one can even see. The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them."
paragraphs.cn: 简介写道：「对彼得·帕克来说，这是一个崭新的一天。在这没人记得他的世界里，他以蜘蛛侠的身份全职打击犯罪——眼睁睁看着老朋友们在没有他的情况下继续生活，这种压力引发了彼得内心的变化，而他可能无法控制。但这种转变，或许也正是唯一能阻止那股冲击纽约和他所爱之人的可怕新威胁的力量——一个无人能见的强大反派。世界或许忘记了彼得·帕克，但他没有忘记他们。」

paragraphs.en: Currently, the confirmed villains for Spider-Man: Brand New Day include Scorpion, Tarantula, Boomerang, The Hand, Tombstone, and, seemingly, a corrupted version of The Hulk. It has long been speculated and rumored that Sadie Sink is playing Jean Grey , leading some to believe she is the film's villain. Could she be using her powers to remain unseen to others? Would Marvel want to reintroduce this character as a villain instead of a hero? It's hard to say right now.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》已确认的反派包括蝎子、狼蛛、回旋镖、手合会、墓碑，以及一个似乎被腐化的绿巨人。长期以来，一直有传闻和猜测称Sadie Sink饰演的是琴·葛蕾，这让部分人认为她就是本片反派。她会不会利用自己的能力让别人看不到她？漫威是打算让这个角色以反派身份回归，而非英雄身份吗？目前还很难说。

paragraphs.en: The trailer for the film also indicated that whoever the villain is, they have some kind of mind-control powers or can possess other people. Jean Grey certainly has the power to hijack someone's mind, which has lent some credibility to these theories. Either way, it's interesting that Marvel is holding back on revealing the film's villain.
paragraphs.cn: 本片预告也暗示，无论反派是谁，他们都具备某种精神控制能力，或者可以附身他人。琴·葛蕾无疑拥有劫持他人思想的能力，这为上述传闻提供了一些可信度。无论如何，漫威迟迟不揭露本片反派的真面目，这本身就很耐人寻味。

paragraphs.en: Instead, Marvel seems to be leaning on the emotional core of the story, which is that Peter Parker is living a lonely, isolated life after wishing that everyone would forget about him in No Way Home. It suggests Brand New Day may dig a bit deeper with heightened personal stakes. Leaks have also indicated that this will be the longest Spider-Man movie to date , at two-and-a-half hours long, so there will be plenty of time for the film to breathe.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威似乎更倾向于强调故事的情感内核：彼得·帕克在《英雄无归》中许愿让所有人遗忘自己后，过着孤独、与世隔绝的生活。这暗示《崭新之日》可能会更深入地挖掘个人层面的危机。此外，泄露消息还指出，本片将是迄今为止最长的蜘蛛侠电影，片长达两个半小时，因此影片会有足够的篇幅慢慢铺陈。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day releases on July 31, but Amazon Prime users will be able to see the film two days early .
paragraphs.cn: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》将于7月31日上映，但亚马逊Prime会员可提前两天观看。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐新闻。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
